# cdm_disconnect { #cdmconnector.cdm_disconnect }

```python
cdm_disconnect(cdm, drop_write_schema=False)
```

Disconnect the CDM's source.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name              | Type   | Description                                                             | Default    |
|-------------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| cdm               | Cdm    | CDM reference.                                                          | _required_ |
| drop_write_schema | bool   | If True, drop write-schema tables before disconnecting (default False). | `False`    |
